{{#if post.collection_cursor.collection_title}}{{post.collection_cursor.collection_title}}{{#else}}Post{{/if}}

{{post.html}}
{{#if post.meta.source_markdown_url}} View as Markdown {{/if}} {{#if post.updated_at_iso}}Updated {{post.updated_at}}{{/if}}

Previous {{post.collection_cursor.prev.title}} {{#if post.collection_cursor.next}} Next {{post.collection_cursor.next.title}} {{/if}}

Next {{post.collection_cursor.next.title}}
{{/if}}
